station_address: Ground floor, Powai Rd Junction, Agra Road, Lal Bahadur Shastri Marg, near Powai Telephone Exchange, Ganesh Nagar, Bhandup West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400083
text: Located beside the signal near Gandhi nagar. It's very busiest petrol pump though it gets the easy access, at the peak hours the place is very crowded and also congested but at non peak time it's good. CNG is also available but only for auto rickshaw. The place also gets flooded during the monsoon. Looking into the quality of petrol some times the quality of petrol is impure. Service is fast for two wheelers and also have good staff.

station_address: Ground floor, Powai Rd Junction, Agra Road, Lal Bahadur Shastri Marg, near Powai Telephone Exchange, Ganesh Nagar, Bhandup West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400083
text:
I’ve been refueling my vehicles at this petrol pump for many years, and it’s consistently provided good service. The pump accepts all payment methods, making transactions smooth and convenient.

However, the location presents a challenge. Situated beside the signal near Gandhi Nagar, it becomes extremely busy during peak hours. The high volume of traffic can lead to significant delays and congestion, making it a bit inconvenient at those times.

Overall, if you visit outside of rush hours, you’ll find it to be a reliable and efficient choice for your refueling needs.

station_address: Ground floor, Powai Rd Junction, Agra Road, Lal Bahadur Shastri Marg, near Powai Telephone Exchange, Ganesh Nagar, Bhandup West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400083
text:
Mangataram petrol pump is a famous petrol pump in Bhandup (West) as well as in Vikhroli & kanjur Marg
It's a shining landmark for Bhandup people
Mangataram petrol pump is nearest to mangataram petrol bus stop also BMC S WARD is near to mangataram petrol pump
All type of fuel & Diesel is available at mangatram petrol pump
Puc , bike garage, bike washing and washroom is available inside mangataram petrol pump
Suraj hotel is next to mangataram petrol pump
Car garage with car accessories is next to mangataram petrol pump

@For food & tea  Lovers
There are maximum veg non-veg including Chinese food and tea shop with affordable price is available near mangataram petrol pump

station_address: Ground floor, Powai Rd Junction, Agra Road, Lal Bahadur Shastri Marg, near Powai Telephone Exchange, Ganesh Nagar, Bhandup West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400083
text: They don't have G-pay now you have to pay with cash or card. That's so slow. Or you can pay UPI but it's so slow they took 30 min and more from one customer that was in a row before me. So if you guys go there to pay with cash or card it will be faster.
